ab: ti Puljaljuyan a ku qali, aljak nua paiwan zuku auta timadju.
ch: 我的好朋友叫 Puljaljuyan，他也是排灣族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Puljaljuyan, and he is also an Paiwan child.

ab: kitulutulu amen i Tjaljakavus a mamav.
ch: 我們一起在來義部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Tjaljakavus tribe.

ab: ru vaik amen a kilangeda ta ramaljemaljeng a menilimilingan, macaqu amen aravac a penaiwanan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說排灣語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Paiwan proficiently.

ab: qacaqaca sa kudrakudral aken, kedrikedri sa kuljakuljay ti Puljaljuyan.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Puljaljuyan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Puljaljuyan is short and thin.

ab: na rucikal aravac ti Puljaljuyan,kinatjengelayan timadju nua timaimanga.
ch: Puljaljuyan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Puljaljuyan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
